data.description: Phase 2: Develop studio/practice name capturing the architecture + software + AI intersection. Domain availability check. Define visual identity basics (typefaces, color palette, logo/wordmark). Write one-line positioning statement. Register domain. Deliverable: brand guide.
data.title: Brand identity & naming

data.body: Step 1 complete: 48 naming candidates generated across 5 families (10 Spatial/Architectural, 10 Process/Making, 10 Natural/Landscape, 13 Conceptual/Abstract, 5 First-Person/Eponymous). Top 10 recommendations with rationale. Written to notes/asmv-4-naming-candidates.md. Ready for human review (needs_human gate).

New naming candidates (v2) generated — two-word names in the 'Learning to See' register, warmer and more personal. 40 candidates across 8 thematic clusters (Seeing/Perception, Making/Becoming, Light/Revelation, Space/Dimension, Ground/Earth, Between/Bridge, Curiosity/Searching, Dwelling/Home). Top 10: Slow Looking, Hidden Dimensions, Gathering Lines, Still Building, Warm Ground, Finding Form, Seeing Through, Quiet Study, Tender Ground, Deeper Ground. Written to notes/asmv-4-naming-candidates-v2.md.
Naming timeboxed and parked. Using 'Learning to See' as placeholder name for now. Will revisit naming when inspiration strikes. Moving forward with other tasks.

Name decided: Parallax. 'Depth revealed through perspective.' Bridges architecture (perception shifts as you move through space), software (parallax scrolling, multiple coordinate systems), and the philosophical position of the practice (no single fixed viewpoint, meaning emerges through shifting positions). Moving forward with this name across all assets.

Final name: Parallax Practice. Updated across all site files (metadata, header, footer, homepage, about). Other ideas noted for reference: parallax lab, embodied code, new dimensions, latent space, throughlines, the soft grid, drafted dimensions — but Parallax Practice is the decision.
